holdings.infoBox: GVAL is an equity ETF with a total of 121 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Cambria Global Value ETF (GVAL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed to select the top 25% of countries from a list of 45 developed and emerging economies, then selects approximately 100 securities from those countries. GVAL was launched on Mar 12, 2014 and is issued by Cambria.
